what_it_does: Stores YAML-frontmatter metadata that registers an image attachment for the design-source channel, pointing to a specific image URI.
observations: The file contains only YAML frontmatter and no body content
standouts: Target uses an image:// channel-scoped URI under capital-raise/p-14
Attachment is typed as images with no inline description
conventions: Uses YAML frontmatter with id, channel, attachment_type, target, and added fields
Target URI is scoped to the design-source channel
concerns: No alt text, caption, or descriptive content is stored in the attachment file itself
notes: This is a bare attachment ledger entry that links the design-source channel to an image asset located at capital-raise/p-14.
questions: What does p-14 represent within capital-raise?
Why is there no title, caption, or alt text for the image?
purpose_vs_actual: The stated purpose is to record an image attachment, and the file does exactly that via typed metadata and a target URI.
intention_signals: It appears to create a discoverable, timestamped reference from a channel to a specific image so the asset can be retrieved in context.
contribution: A typed, timestamped pointer that associates the design-source channel with an image asset in the capital-raise topic area.
summary_for_embedding: A YAML-frontmatter attachment record named att-747b993e in the design-source channel that references image://design-source/capital-raise/p-14 and was added on 2026-06-22.
intention_for_embedding: To register an image asset in the design-source channel so it can be located and used alongside channel content.
